default.author: @dave_k
default.author-info: // lakehouse owner, verified not a bot
default.quote: I hired them because they said they were "full-stack." Turns out they meant literally stacking boards. But honestly? Best deck I've ever had. The joists are immaculate.

default.author: @linda_builds
default.quote: They kept calling my old deck "legacy infrastructure" and referred to the rotten boards as "technical debt." Weird guys. But they built me an absolute unit of a deck in two weeks flat.

default.author: @garage_mike
default.quote: Tom showed up on day one with a ThinkPad running Arch Linux and a Dewalt miter saw. I didn't know what to expect. What I got was the most precisely measured, beautifully finished deck in the neighborhood.
